Title: Cart page and heading are visible
Preconditions: User is logged in with items in cart
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/cart; 2. Verify 'Your Cart' or 'Cart' heading is visible
Expected_Result: Cart page loads and displays cart heading correctly

Title: @smoke Cart page loads with items and heading
Preconditions: User is logged in with items in cart
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/cart; 2. Verify heading visible; 3. Verify cart items visible
Expected_Result: Cart page displays heading and contains cart items

Title: Cart row shows image name quantity controls and price
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item
Steps: 1. Locate first cart item row; 2. Verify image is visible; 3. Verify product name in h3; 4. Verify + and − buttons; 5. Verify price with $
Expected_Result: Cart row displays all required elements: image name quantity controls and price

Title: Quantity controls update cart
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item
Steps: 1. Locate + button on first item; 2. Click + button; 3. Observe quantity change
Expected_Result: Plus button increments quantity and cart updates

Title: Quantity controls update cart
Steps: 1. Locate − button on first item; 2. Click − button; 3. Observe quantity change
Expected_Result: Minus button decrements quantity and cart updates

Title: Remove item from cart
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item
Steps: 1. Click Remove button on first item; 2. Observe item removal
Expected_Result: Item is removed from cart and cart list reflows

Title: Empty cart state is visible when all items removed
Steps: 1. Click Remove on all items; 2. Observe empty state
Expected_Result: Empty cart message appears after removing all items

Title: Continue shopping navigates to home
Expected_Result: User is redirected to /ecommerce or home page

Title: Checkout button navigates to checkout info
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item

Title: @smoke Checkout button navigates to checkout-info
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item
Steps: 1. Click Checkout button; 2. Verify navigation to checkout-info
Expected_Result: Checkout button navigates successfully to checkout-info page

Title: Total formula remains non-decreasing when quantity increases
Steps: 1. Capture total before qty change; 2. Click + button; 3. Capture total after; 4. Verify total >= before
Expected_Result: Total amount remains non-decreasing when quantity increases

Title: Cart route enforces access guard for unauthenticated state
Steps: 1. Clear cookies and storage; 2. Navigate to /ecommerce/cart
Expected_Result: User is redirected to login page; unauthenticated access is blocked

Title: Rapid quantity clicks keep cart interaction stable
Steps: 1. Rapid click + button multiple times; 2. Observe cart stability
Expected_Result: Cart remains stable and consistent despite rapid clicks; no duplicate updates occur

Title: @regression Cart persists item after page reload
Steps: 1. Count items in cart; 2. Reload page; 3. Verify items persist
Expected_Result: Cart items persist after page reload; item count matches or is reasonable

Title: @regression Cart item row shows correct price format
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item
Steps: 1. Locate price in cart row; 2. Verify price format includes $
Expected_Result: Price is displayed in correct currency format with $ symbol

Title: @regression Continue shopping from empty cart goes to home
Steps: 1. Remove all items from cart; 2. Click Continue Shopping; 3. Observe navigation
Expected_Result: User is redirected to home page or stays on cart with appropriate messaging
